Package neqsim.process.safety.mdmt

Class MDMTCalculator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.mdmt.MDMTCalculator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MDMTCalculator extends Object implements Serializable
Minimum Design Metal Temperature (MDMT) screening calculator for pressure equipment.

Implements a simplified Procedure based on API 579-1 / ASME FFS-1 Part 3 (brittle fracture assessment) and ASME B31.3 / Section VIII Div. 1 UCS-66 / UHA-51 impact-test exemption curves. Used to verify that a vessel exposed to cold blowdown (Joule–Thomson cooling) will not become susceptible to brittle fracture.

Inputs: material toughness curve (A/B/C/D per UCS-66 Fig.), governing thickness, design stress ratio, and minimum operating temperature. Returns: MDMT in °C and PASS/FAIL verdict.

References:

  • API 579-1 / ASME FFS-1 Part 3 — Brittle Fracture
  • ASME Section VIII Div. 1, UCS-66 / UCS-66.1 / Fig. UCS-66
  • BS 7910 Annex K (toughness from Charpy correlation)
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • MDMTCalculator

      public MDMTCalculator(MDMTCalculator.MaterialCurve curve, double governingThicknessMm)
      Construct an MDMT calculator.
      Parameters:
      curve - material toughness curve from UCS-66
      governingThicknessMm - governing thickness per UCS-66.3 in mm

  • Method Details

    • setStressRatio

      public MDMTCalculator setStressRatio(double ratio)
      Set the stress ratio (applied / allowable). Lower stress ratios permit colder MDMT per UCS-66.1.
      Parameters:
      ratio - stress ratio in [0, 1]
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • getMDMT_C

      public double getMDMT_C()
      Compute the MDMT in °C without impact testing per UCS-66 Figure curves.

      Approximates Fig. UCS-66 with simple analytic curves of MDMT vs thickness for the four UCS-66 groups, then applies the stress-ratio reduction per UCS-66.1 Fig. UCS-66.1 (up to 55 °C colder for low stress).

      Returns:
      MDMT in °C

    • isAcceptable

      public boolean isAcceptable(double minOperatingTempC)
      Brittle-fracture screening verdict per API 579 Procedure 3-A.
      Parameters:
      minOperatingTempC - minimum operating metal temperature seen in blowdown / cold service
      Returns:
      true if the operating temperature is warmer than or equal to the MDMT

    • report

      public String report(double minOperatingTempC)
      Build a multi-line text report.
      Parameters:
      minOperatingTempC - minimum operating metal temperature in °C
      Returns:
      human-readable summary
